title: International Paper Declares Dividend
text: MEMPHIS, Tenn. , July 11, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- International Paper (NYSE: IP) today declared a quarterly dividend of $0.4625 per share for the period from July 1, 2023, to September 30, 2023, inclusive, on the common stock, par value $1.00, of the Company, payable on September 15, 2023, to holders of record at the close of business on August 15, 2023.
